Petition For Order That Estate Plan Does Not Exist And That Assets Held In Trust Belong To Decedents Estate
Off Calendar Apr-05-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Andrea Nguyen, via Zoom, for Milton Hahn, Petitioner.

The court points Ms. Nguyen to the most recent Examiner's notes and allows her to address the court. Ms. Nguyen offers oral advocacy in support of the instant petition including, but not limited to, regarding the statutory presumption of revocation and that the drafting attorneys do not have original copies of documents. The court points Ms. Nguyen to probate code 15401.

After additional discussion, the court advises Ms. Nguyen of what the court is considering ordering and confirms that she is submitting to the court's tentative ruling regarding the limited relief.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Cristobal. Not reported.

Petition For Order That Estate Plan Does Not Exist And That Assets Held In Trust Belong To Decedents Estate
Off Calendar Feb-28-2022 Continued To Apr-04-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Oct-04-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed. The will dated Jan-17-2014 and codicil dated Feb-25-2014 are admitted to probate. Milton Steven Hahn is appointed as the Administrator with full authority. Bond is set at $1,300,000. Michael Kasolas is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Oct-17-2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
